steps.title: Translate the length-height relationship
steps.content: The problem states the vehicle's length is 4 times its height. Since $x$ represents length and $y$ represents height, this translates to $x = 4y$. Systems that use $y = 4x$ reverse the relationship, making height 4 times length instead.

steps.title: Translate the height value and identify the system
steps.content: The problem states the height of a certain vehicle is 76 inches. Since $y$ represents height, this gives us $y = 76$. The system of equations must contain both $x = 4y$ and $y = 76$. That matches the correct answer — B is correct.
